name: Descent the Abyss
short_description: Descent the Abyss - you take on the role of an experienced detective who goes in search of a lost traveler lost in a dangerous underground labyrinth. You must explore dark and twisted corridors, solve puzzles, fight monsters, and overcome traps to navigate through danger and find the missing person.
detailed_description:
Descent the Abyss - you take on the role of an experienced detective who goes in search of a lost traveler lost in a dangerous underground labyrinth. You must explore dark and twisted corridors, solve puzzles, fight monsters, and overcome traps to navigate through danger and find the missing person.

Faced with secrets and threats, you must use your intelligence, logic and powers of observation to solve the mystery and bring the traveler back. Will you be able to successfully complete the task in the dungeon, or will you remain a prisoner of its sinister secrets and terrifying secret writings?

Game Features:
- Pixel graphics
- Varied levels
- Nice soundtrack
